steps.title: Identify the key signal
steps.content: The word “outliers” signals that jets reaching the ionosphere are exceptional. The blank must introduce information that reinforces this claim.

steps.title: Match the confirming transition
steps.content: ”Indeed” introduces information that reinforces a previous point. In context, it introduces the fact that most jets reach only 20–50 km—which confirms the exceptional status of those reaching 80+ km. The other choices don't establish this confirming function: “nevertheless” introduces contradiction, “consequently” implies causation, and “in addition” treats the information as independent. This matches choice C — C is correct.
